name: Namaadhu
subtitle: Maldives prayer times
description: Accurate Maldivian prayer times, Qibla compass, and prayer tracker.

apps.name: Namaadhu
apps.subtitle: Maldives prayer times, Qibla & tracker
apps.localizedDescription: Namaadhu shows accurate prayer times for every island in the Maldives, with exact-time notifications, a Qibla compass, a daily prayer tracker, and Dhivehi/English support. Anchored to Maldives time wherever you are.

versions.localizedDescription: Initial release: prayer times, notifications, Qibla, tracker, widgets.

privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We need your location to automatically detect your nearest island and provide accurate prayer times for your area.
